Petition To Appoint Jewish Family & Children Serv'S As Successor Trustee Of Testamentary Trust Crea
Off Calendar Dec-28-2015 Continued To Jan-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Appoint Jewish Family & Children Serv'S As Successor Trustee Of Testamentary Trust Crea
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Continued To Dec-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for Jewish Family & Children's Services. Garson Soe for (trustee) Andy McHugh.

Ms. Friedeberg stated that they need more time, that she has been trying to contact the trustee for over a year, that they thought this was only a testamentary trust but have now received other documents and that they need time to review. The petition to appoint Jewish Family & Children's services as successor trustee, etc., was continued to December 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised counsel that this would be the last continuance.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
